description_cn: 相等长度，（尽可能使一组线长度均相等。用此运算器配合CyclicQuad限定四边形网格的四边或对角线可以得到接近正方形的网格。多用于网格优化得到高质量网格。）
description_en: Equal lengths (make a set of lines as equal in length as possible. Using this operator in conjunction with CyclicQuad to constrain the four sides or diagonals of a quadrilateral mesh can produce a near-square mesh. This is often used for mesh optimization to obtain high-quality meshes.)

parameters.name: Line
parameters.desc_en: A list of lines of equal length is needed.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束的强度/权重，这条约束在求解器中的地位越高，两点间的距离就越会趋向于目标值。
parameters.desc_en: The strength/weight of the constraint: the higher the status of the constraint in the solver, the closer the distance between the two points will be to the target value.

author: Kangaroo Team
